description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a lean build, featuring spiky hair and a bare upper torso. He wears tattered knee-length shorts adorned with patches and skull motifs, and his right arm is replaced by a mechanical, segmented prosthetic with orange elements. His left arm is gloved, and his right leg is a mechanical prosthesis, while his left leg is wrapped in bandages and ends in a rugged boot. The figure's posture is slightly forward-leaning, suggesting movement or readiness. The overall appearance is rugged and eccentric, with a mix of human and mechanical features.
description: A stylized adult male with spiky hair, mechanical arm and leg prosthetics, tattered shorts, and a rugged, eccentric look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spiky hair, bare chest, mechanical right arm, gloved left hand, patched shorts, and mechanical right leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the spiky hair, mechanical arm, and the rugged boot on the left foot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back details, mechanical arm attachment, shorts with skull motifs, and both prosthetic and natural legs.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the segmented mechanical arm and leg, as well as the forward-leaning posture.
attribute_clothing_type: tattered knee-length shorts with patches and skull motifs, single glove, bandaged leg, rugged boot, mechanical prosthetic arm and leg
attribute_posture: standing with a slight forward lean
